portfolio.about-me.p-1:
Write some information about yourself that is IT related. Why are you passionate about
        coding? What is your source of inspiration for improving your programming skills?
portfolio.about-me.p-2:
Where are you located? Are you open to different ways of working, such as working remotely
        or even relocating?
portfolio.about-me.p-3:
Show that you are open-minded. Are you enthusiastic about learning new technologies and
        continually improving your skills?
portfolio.about-me.p-4:
A brief description of your problem-solving approach. Do you learn from each challenge as
        you search for the most efficient or elegant solution? You can include some keywords like:
        analytical thinking, creativity, persistence and collaboration.
portfolio.about-me.title: About me
portfolio.contact-me.checkbox-label: I've read the privacy policy and agree to the processing of my data as outlined.
portfolio.contact-me.p-1:
Encourage people to contact you and describe what role you are interested in. Show that
          you will add value to their projects through your work.
portfolio.contact-me.title: Contact
portfolio.contact-me.warning-4: Your Message is required. min 20 Character.
portfolio.imprint.title: Legal Notice
portfolio.portfolio.p-1: Explore a selection of my work here - Interact with projects to see my skills in action.

portfolio.portfolio.p-3: Based on the PokéAPI a simple library that provides and catalogues pokemon information.

portfolio.portfolio.p-5: Task manager inspired by the Kanban System. Create and organize tasks using drag and drop functions, assign users and categories.
portfolio.portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.skills.p-1: Show that you have used a variety of front-end technologies in your projects.
portfolio.skills.p-3: Reveal enthusiasm for learning new technologies and frameworks.
portfolio.skills.title: My Skills
